welcome.title: Your safe place is waiting
welcome.description: Build your own sanctuary through a series of gentle creative prompts. A blank canvas for your thoughts and feelings.

prompts.quote: What does the sky look like in your safe place? Draw its colour, light, or feeling.
prompts.hint: There's no right way — any mark is enough.

prompts.quote: What does the ground feel like? Grass, sand, water, a wooden floor? Add it below the sky.
prompts.hint: Think about what your feet feel in this place.

prompts.quote: Add one thing that belongs here — a tree, a chair, a window, a pet, a lamp. Anything that feels right.
prompts.hint: It doesn't have to look perfect. It just has to feel true.

prompts.quote: What brings warmth or comfort to this place? A light, a fire, sunlight, a blanket? Add it wherever it feels right.
prompts.hint: Even a small dot of colour counts.

prompts.quote: Finally — add 3 to 5 words that belong here. Tap your drawing to place them anywhere.

save.title: Preserve your safe place
save.desc: Give your creation a name and a brief reflection.
save.name_label: What do you call this place?
save.privacy_note: This stays private — only visible to you and your therapist.

grounding.title: You're here. You're safe.
grounding.done_message: Well done for showing up for yourself today.

history.title: Past safe places
history.no_collages: No saved collages yet. Complete the activity to save your first one.

common.completion_message: You've successfully completed this activity. Take a moment to appreciate your progress.
common.share_text: I have done this {{activityName}} in TherapyMantra and really enjoy it you can do it too just follow the link to android app {{androidUrl}} or ios app {{iosUrl}}
common.instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
common.instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath
